dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 8762 IH: To amend the Commodity Credit Corporation Charter Act to exclude crops used to produce biofuel with respect to an agricultural commodity.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Perry introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on Agriculture

form.official-title: To amend the Commodity Credit Corporation Charter Act to exclude crops used to produce biofuel with respect to an agricultural commodity.

section.header: Exclusion of crops used to produce biofuel with respect to agricultural commodity in Commodity Credit Corporation Charter Act
section.text: Section 5 of the Commodity Credit Corporation Charter Act (15 U.S.C. 714c) is amended by inserting or crops used to produce biofuel (including any infrastructure relating to such crops) after tobacco each place such term appears.
